name: contextual-cheatsheet
title: Contextual Cheatsheet
description: Show keybindings and cheatsheets for the currently focused app. Configurable per-app URLs or local markdown from your flote-vault.
author: loudog

commands.name: show-cheatsheet
commands.title: Show Cheatsheet
commands.description: Show the cheatsheet for the currently focused app

commands.name: set-cheatsheet
commands.title: Set Cheatsheet URL
commands.description: Set a custom cheatsheet URL for the currently focused app

commands.name: manage-cheatsheets
commands.title: Manage Cheatsheets
commands.description: View and edit all configured app cheatsheets
